name: GST-Tag Protein Purification (Glutathione Sepharose)
nameCn: GST 标签蛋白纯化（谷胱甘肽琼脂糖亲和层析）

briefSteps.en: Express GST-fusion protein at 18°C → lyse cells (PBS + 1% Triton X-100) → clarify lysate → equilibrate Glutathione Sepharose → bind → wash with PBS → elute with 10 mM reduced glutathione → dialyze → optionally cleave GST tag → store at −80°C
briefSteps.zh: 18°C 表达 GST 融合蛋白 → 裂解细胞（PBS + 1% Triton X-100）→ 澄清裂解液 → 平衡谷胱甘肽琼脂糖 → 结合 → PBS 洗涤 → 10 mM 还原型谷胱甘肽洗脱 → 透析 → 可选切除 GST 标签 → −80°C 保存

detailedSteps.en: Transform and express GST-fusion protein in E. coli BL21(DE3). Induce with 0.1–0.5 mM IPTG at 18°C overnight to maximize solubility. Harvest cells at 5,000×g for 10 min at 4°C.
detailedSteps.zh: 在 E. coli BL21(DE3) 中转化并表达 GST 融合蛋白。用 0.1–0.5 mM IPTG 在 18°C 过夜诱导以最大化可溶性。5,000×g、4°C 离心 10 min 收菌。

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend cell pellet in GST lysis buffer (PBS pH 7.4 + 1% Triton X-100 + 1 mM DTT + protease inhibitors + 1 mM PMSF) at 5 mL per gram wet weight. Keep on ice.
detailedSteps.zh: 每克湿菌体加 5 mL GST 裂解液（PBS pH 7.4 + 1% Triton X-100 + 1 mM DTT + 蛋白酶抑制剂 + 1 mM PMSF）重悬，冰上操作。

detailedSteps.en: Lyse cells by sonication on ice: 5 cycles of 30 s pulse at 40% amplitude with 1 min rest between pulses. Keep sample temperature below 10°C throughout.
detailedSteps.zh: 冰浴超声裂解：40% 振幅，5 次 × 30 s，每次间隔 1 min。全程保持样品温度低于 10°C。

detailedSteps.en: Clarify lysate at 20,000×g for 30 min at 4°C. Collect supernatant. Optional: pass through 0.45 µm filter to protect column. Save aliquot for SDS-PAGE.
detailedSteps.zh: 20,000×g、4°C 离心 30 min 澄清裂解液。收集上清。可选：0.45 µm 过滤保护柱子。留样做 SDS-PAGE。

detailedSteps.en: Equilibrate Glutathione Sepharose 4B (1 mL resin per 10 mg expected protein) with 10 CV PBS pH 7.4. For AKTA, use GSTrap FF 5 mL column.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 10 CV PBS pH 7.4 平衡谷胱甘肽琼脂糖 4B（每 10 mg 预估蛋白用 1 mL 树脂）。AKTA 可用 GSTrap FF 5 mL 柱。

detailedSteps.en: Load cleared lysate onto equilibrated resin at ≤1 mL/min (gravity or peristaltic pump). Collect flow-through fraction for SDS-PAGE verification.
detailedSteps.zh: 以 ≤1 mL/min 流速（重力法或蠕动泵）将澄清裂解液上树脂。收集穿透液做 SDS-PAGE 验证。

detailedSteps.en: Wash with 10–20 CV PBS pH 7.4 until A280 returns to baseline. Optional: additional 5 CV high-salt wash (PBS + 500 mM NaCl) to remove ionic contaminants.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 10–20 CV PBS pH 7.4 洗涤至 A280 基线。可选：5 CV 高盐洗涤（PBS + 500 mM NaCl）去除离子性杂质。

detailedSteps.en: Elute with 5–10 CV GST elution buffer (50 mM Tris pH 8.0 + 10 mM reduced glutathione). Collect 0.5 mL fractions; protein peak typically in fractions 2–6.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 5–10 CV GST 洗脱缓冲液（50 mM Tris pH 8.0 + 10 mM 还原型谷胱甘肽）洗脱。收集 0.5 mL 组分；蛋白峰通常在第 2–6 组分。

detailedSteps.en: Pool peak fractions and dialyze against storage buffer (PBS or desired buffer) at 4°C with 3 buffer changes, or desalt using HiTrap Desalting column to remove glutathione.
detailedSteps.zh: 合并峰值组分，对储存缓冲液（PBS 或所需缓冲液）在 4°C 换液 3 次透析，或用 HiTrap Desalting 柱去除谷胱甘肽。

detailedSteps.en: Optional GST tag cleavage: incubate with thrombin (1 U per 100 µg) at RT for 2 h, or PreScission protease (1 U/µg) at 4°C overnight. Perform reverse GSTrap purification — cleaved protein flows through; GST and uncleaved protein bind.
detailedSteps.zh: 可选 GST 标签切除：凝血酶（1 U/100 µg）室温 2 h，或 PreScission 蛋白酶（1 U/µg）4°C 过夜。反向 GSTrap 纯化——切割后蛋白流过，GST 和未切割蛋白结合。

detailedSteps.en: Quantify by BCA or Bradford assay. Run SDS-PAGE with Coomassie staining to confirm purity (expect 2–20 mg/L culture yield). Aliquot, snap-freeze in liquid N₂, and store at −80°C with 10% glycerol.
detailedSteps.zh: BCA 或 Bradford 法定量。考马斯蓝染色 SDS-PAGE 确认纯度（预期产量 2–20 mg/L 培养液）。分装后液氮速冻，加 10% 甘油 −80°C 保存。

note.en: Clarified lysate can be stored at 4°C overnight before affinity purification.
note.zh: 澄清裂解液可在 4°C 保存过夜后再进行亲和纯化。

note.en: Eluted protein in glutathione buffer can be held at 4°C overnight before dialysis or tag cleavage.
note.zh: 含谷胱甘肽的洗脱蛋白可在 4°C 保存过夜，次日再透析或切除标签。

note.en: Dialyzed purified protein can be aliquoted and stored at −80°C with 10% glycerol for up to 12 months.
note.zh: 透析后的纯化蛋白加 10% 甘油分装，可于 −80°C 保存 12 个月。

components.name: 1. Express GST-fusion protein in E. coli BL21(DE3)

note.en: IPTG 0.1–0.5 mM; 18°C overnight for soluble expression (preferred over 37°C 4 h). Harvest: 5,000×g 10 min 4°C.
note.zh: IPTG 0.1–0.5 mM；18°C 过夜低温诱导（优于 37°C 4 h 高温诱导）。5,000×g 10 min 4°C 收菌。

components.name: 2. Resuspend pellet in GST Lysis Buffer

note.en: PBS pH 7.4 + 1% Triton X-100 + 1 mM DTT + protease inhibitors + 1 mM PMSF; 5 mL/g wet weight
note.zh: PBS pH 7.4 + 1% Triton X-100 + 1 mM DTT + 蛋白酶抑制剂 + 1 mM PMSF；每克湿重加 5 mL

components.name: 3. Lyse: sonicate on ice (5 × 30 s, 40% amplitude, 1 min rest)

note.en: Keep sample below 10°C throughout. Pre-cool probe.
note.zh: 全程保持样品 <10°C。预冷超声探头。

note.en: Keep supernatant. Optional: 0.45 µm filter to protect column.
note.zh: 保留上清。可选：0.45 µm 过滤保护柱子。

components.name: 5. Equilibrate Glutathione Sepharose 4B: 10 CV PBS pH 7.4

note.en: Use 1 mL resin per 10 mg expected fusion protein. Or use GSTrap FF 5 mL column (AKTA).
note.zh: 每 10 mg 预估融合蛋白用 1 mL 树脂。或使用 GSTrap FF 5 mL 柱（AKTA）。

components.name: 6. Bind: load cleared lysate, flow rate ≤1 mL/min, 4°C

note.en: Gravity or peristaltic pump. Collect flow-through for SDS-PAGE.
note.zh: 重力法或蠕动泵上样。收集穿透液做 SDS-PAGE 检测。

components.name: 7. Wash: 10–20 CV PBS pH 7.4 until A280 baseline

note.en: Optional high-salt wash: PBS + 500 mM NaCl, 5 CV.
note.zh: 可选高盐洗涤：PBS + 500 mM NaCl，5 CV。

components.name: 8. Elute: 5–10 CV gst_elution_reduced (10 mM GSH, 50 mM Tris pH 8.0)

note.en: Collect 0.5 mL fractions; protein peak in fractions 2–6.
note.zh: 收集 0.5 mL 组分；蛋白峰通常在第 2–6 组分。

note.en: dialysis_buffer_generic; 3× changes at 4°C. Or desalt by HiTrap Desalting.
note.zh: dialysis_buffer_generic 透析换液；4°C 换 3 次。或 HiTrap Desalting 脱盐柱。

components.name: 10. Optional: cleave GST-tag (thrombin or PreScission protease)

note.en: Thrombin: 1 U/100 µg, RT 2 h or 4°C overnight. PreScission: 1 U/µg, 4°C overnight. Reverse purification: pass through GSTrap → cleaved protein flows through.
note.zh: 凝血酶：1 U/100 µg，RT 2 h 或 4°C 过夜。PreScission：1 U/µg，4°C 过夜。反向纯化：过 GSTrap 柱 → 切割后蛋白在穿透液中。
典型产量：2–20 mg/L 培养液。

notes.en: GST (26 kDa) may affect folding — consider PreScission cleavage. GST often dimerizes. Lower IPTG (0.1 mM) + 18°C dramatically improves solubility. Avoid detergents >0.1% in binding buffer (strips GST from beads).
notes.zh: GST 标签（26 kDa）可能影响蛋白折叠，建议 PreScission 蛋白酶切除。GST 易二聚化。低 IPTG（0.1 mM）+ 低温（18°C）显著提高可溶性。结合缓冲液洗涤剂 ≤0.1%。

ref: Harper & Speicher (2011) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 6.6.1–26; GE Healthcare Glutathione Sepharose Handbook; Smith & Johnson (1988) Gene 67:31–40

usage.en: Purify GST-tagged recombinant proteins using glutathione affinity chromatography.
usage.zh: 谷胱甘肽亲和层析纯化 GST 标签重组蛋白。
